title: DOGE updates + Liberation Day Tariff Reactions with Ben Shapiro and Antonio Gracias
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Ben Shapiro and Antonio Gracias

(1:54) Why Antonio is helping out and what it's like working with DOGE

(4:56) DOGE's latest findings: illegal immigration, social security, and more

(27:59) Was Biden's open border policy a Dem strategy to expand their voter base?

(39:55) Tariffs: Liberation Day chaos, reactions, strategy

(55:26) Impact, consequences, and risks for the Trump Administration

(1:13:50) How the US can thrive in a high-tariff world

(1:31:33) Future US political landscape if the tariff strategy fails

(1:42:27) Chamath recaps his best-performing asset of 2025 + wrap

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses DOGE updates, Liberation Day tariff reactions, and US political landscape with guests Ben Shapiro and Antonio Gracias. They cover topics such as illegal immigration, social security, and the potential consequences of the Trump Administration's tariff strategy. The episode also touches on the future of the US in a high-tariff world and the potential risks and consequences of the current political landscape.

takeaways.text: Biden's open border policy may be a Dem strategy to expand voter base
DOGE findings include issues with illegal immigration and social security
Liberation Day tariffs caused chaos and sparked reactions
The US can thrive in a high-tariff world with the right strategy
The Trump Administration's tariff strategy carries significant risks and consequences
The future US political landscape is uncertain and dependent on various factors
Chamath's best-performing asset of 2025 is discussed
The impact of tariffs on the US economy is a major concern

sentiment.notes: The mood of the episode is cautious, as the hosts and guests discuss the potential risks and consequences of the current political landscape and the Trump Administration's tariff strategy.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of Biden's open border policy
Chamath discusses his best-performing asset of 2025
